source.reference: M61 AP 150gr steel-core (hardened steel penetrator). Litz G7=0.218 (Applied Ballistics). APG estimate ~0.205. Using Litz value pending new Doppler data. No soft-tissue fragmentation; core penetrates intact.
source.methodology: BC values sourced from Bryan Litz's Applied Ballistics published Doppler radar measurements and form factor analysis.
